meta.title: Cloud Host | High-Performance Cloud Hosting
meta.description: Enterprise-grade cloud hosting solutions powered by cutting-edge hardware and a global fiber-optic network.

sections.headline: Infinite Scalability for the Modern Web
sections.description: Cloud Host provides high-performance cloud solutions engineered for mission-critical applications. Experience 99.99% uptime with global edge connectivity.

image.alt: Modern server room with glowing blue LED lights on racks, symmetrical perspective, clean high-tech architectural datacenter environment

sections.heading: Precision Engineered Solutions
sections.description: We offer a range of products designed to handle everything from light blog traffic to massive enterprise-scale data processing.

cards.title: Cloud Hosting
cards.description: Optimized for CMS like WordPress and custom React/Next.js applications. Scalable resources with automated backups and NVMe SSD storage.

cards.title: VPS Elite
cards.description: Dedicated resources with full root access. Choose your OS and scale instantly as your user base grows.

cards.title: Bare Metal
cards.description: Maximum performance with raw hardware access. No virtualization layer overhead for compute-intensive workloads.

cards.title: Global Infrastructure
cards.description: 24 data centers strategically located across 5 continents to ensure your content is always close to your users.

image.alt: World map with data connection nodes

cards.title: Fortified Security
cards.description: Multi-layer DDoS protection, automatic backups, and hardware-level encryption are standard features.

cards.title: Expert Support
cards.description: Real humans. Real engineers. 24/7/365 availability with a 15-minute response guarantee.

cards.title: Tier III Certified Infrastructure
cards.description: Our data centers meet the highest global standards for availability and power redundancy, featuring N+1 configurations.

cards.title: Green Cloud
cards.description: Committed to carbon-neutral operations by 2030 through renewable energy.

sections.heading: Enterprise Grade Security
sections.description: Your data is your most valuable asset. We protect it with multi-layered security protocols and 24/7 monitoring.

image.alt: Fiber optic cables with security icons

features.title: Real-time Threat Detection
features.description: AI-powered systems analyze traffic patterns to mitigate attacks before they reach your server.

features.title: Encrypted Storage
features.description: All data at rest is encrypted using AES-256 standards, ensuring privacy and compliance.

features.title: Compliance Ready
features.description: Certified for ISO 27001, SOC2 Type II, and GDPR readiness for global operations.

summary.heading: Clients believe in us
summary.description: Trusted by startups, agencies, and enterprises running websites and mission-critical apps.

items.name: Rafi Hasan
items.message: Migration was smooth and uptime has been excellent. Their support team responds quickly and explains technical issues clearly.

items.name: Mira Dutta
items.message: We moved our APIs to Cloud Host and saw immediate performance gains. The dashboard and deployment flow are straightforward.

items.name: Andra Wijaya
items.message: Provisioning new environments takes minutes, and monitoring gives us clear visibility into every service in production.

items.name: Kevin Santoso
items.message: The managed database offering has been reliable and fast. Backups and restore workflows are simple and dependable.

items.name: Nadia Putri
items.message: Support quality stands out. We always get actionable recommendations, not generic replies, when something needs attention.

items.name: Rizki Mahendra
items.message: Traffic spikes are no longer stressful. Auto-scaling and performance remained stable during our biggest product launch week.

items.name: Felicia Tan
items.message: Our storefront latency dropped significantly after migration. Customers notice faster checkout and smoother browsing.

items.name: Bagas Pratama
items.message: Deployment pipelines integrate cleanly with our stack. The platform feels built for teams shipping continuously.

sections.heading: Our Partners
sections.description: We collaborate with trusted technology and infrastructure brands.

sections.heading: Ready to Scale?
sections.description: Join over 10,000 developers and businesses who trust Cloud Host for their infrastructure needs.

brand.name: Cloud Host
brand.description: Premium cloud hosting solutions with a focus on speed, security, and world-class support.
